title: Berry Fantastic
description:
A simple mod that adds pies (with cake like features).

Made for Modfest 2026.
body:
Pies in the craft :fire:
--- More elaborately, this mod adds: - Pies for sweet and glow berries - Pies being differently consumable (similar to cakes) - Maybe more if I got more time :fire: --- Thanks to the modfest staff for helping during the making of this mod and stuff :fire:
